message.body: Uhh i finished all the secrets today
I died past the 1f plane jump 10 times lmaoo
Uhhh i dont know how to describe it
One that is reccomended to cancle jump on
Was good practice i guess but was interesting dying past it that many times
Was like a solid 20% chance i pass the 1f jump into plane
Else i got close clears on crimson and desti but no luck
Desti had like 7 close to white phase attempts
when will there be a 261 friendly stream
Hopes are that i can do 100%
the needle in k3 is pretty good I just don't like the bosses
Hot take I only really like the needle in some of the secrets and the extra stages. There are few sections where the needle was enjoyable
I have 3 cats and a dog,
pretty sure I've only shown you schlorb
Anyway. I recently made a grim discovery that the medication I'm taking can cause a benign brain tumor that makes you forgetful.

and like 80% happier when i deleted k3 after finally winning
also I don't really like these big community servers. I'm much more of a small friendgroup server type of person.

bhop is easy tbf, you just jump a certain height then jump again the frame you touch the floor
your max height is 4.4 if you bhop its 4.5
AND I HAVE NO IDEA HOW IS THAT EVEN SUPPOSED TO WORK
Uhh bhopping can be used to get a specific v-align im pretty sure
lets you jump higher, but you can pause trick
its like the y subpixel i think
I would ignore bhopping unless you play a needle that really NEEDS v-aligns
u gotta start valignmaxxing ur subpixeljumpheightchuds
Or if you want to play harder needles
I don't really know any of the nuance behind it I kinda just learned to bhop overtime
bhopping is pretty much never used outside of skips
its an annoyingly inconsistent jump if u dont pause trick it
If you play nhof precision needles you will need to understand it very well on the other hand

i only play boshy and k3
